---
title: "Thesis Data Analysis"
author: "Kylian de Rooij"
date: "04-06-2026"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(irr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)

metrics     <- read_csv("dataset.csv")
readability <- read_csv("dataset_readability.csv")
human       <- read_csv("human_readability_annotation.csv")
runtime     <- read_csv("runtimes.csv")

df <- left_join(metrics, readability, by = c("username", "year", "day", "filename"))
df <- left_join(df, human, by = c("username", "year", "day", "filename"))
df <- left_join(df, runtime, by = c("username", "year", "day"))

df <- df |>
  mutate(
    heavy_library = as.logical(heavy_library),
    year = as.integer(year),
    day  = as.integer(day)
  ) |>
  filter(sloc > 0)

cat("Rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("Rows with human annotation:", sum(!is.na(df$human_readability)), "\n")
cat("Rows with runtime:", sum(!is.na(df$runtime)), "\n")
```

## Cohen's Kappa

```{r warning=FALSE}
annotated <- df |> filter(!is.na(human_readability))
scores <- annotated |> select(readability_score, human_readability)

kappa2(scores, weight = "squared")

annotated <- annotated |> mutate(diff = abs(readability_score - human_readability))
cat("Mean absolute difference:", round(mean(annotated$diff), 2), "\n")
cat("Identical:", sum(annotated$diff == 0), "out of 50\n")
cat("Within 1 point:", sum(annotated$diff <= 1), "out of 50\n")
```

## Descriptive Statistics

```{r warning=FALSE}
df |>
  select(cyclomatic_complexity, cognitive_complexity,
         halstead_volume, halstead_difficulty,
         sloc, max_nesting_depth, readability_score) |>
  summary()

cat("\nReadability score distribution:\n")
table(df$readability_score)
```

## Normality Tests

```{r}
set.seed(42)
s <- df |> slice_sample(n = 1000)

shapiro.test(s$cyclomatic_complexity)
shapiro.test(s$cognitive_complexity)
shapiro.test(s$halstead_volume)
shapiro.test(s$halstead_difficulty)
shapiro.test(s$sloc)
shapiro.test(s$readability_score)
```

## Missing Values

```{r}
cat("Rows with any NA in complexity columns:",
    sum(!complete.cases(df |> select(cyclomatic_complexity, cognitive_complexity,
                                      halstead_volume, halstead_difficulty,
                                      max_nesting_depth))), "\n")

cat("Rows where both cyclomatic and cognitive are NA:",
    sum(is.na(df$cyclomatic_complexity) & is.na(df$cognitive_complexity)), "\n")

df |> filter(is.na(cyclomatic_complexity)) |> count(year)
```

## Outlier Check

```{r}
df <- df |>
  group_by(day) |>
  mutate(
    sloc_zscore = (sloc - mean(sloc, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(sloc, na.rm = TRUE),
    short_file  = sloc_zscore < -2
  ) |>
  ungroup()

cat("Suspiciously short files:", sum(df$short_file, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Heavy library files:", sum(df$heavy_library, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Final rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
```

## Spearman Correlations: Complexity vs Readability

```{r warning=FALSE}
metrics_list <- c("cyclomatic_complexity", "cognitive_complexity",
                  "halstead_volume", "halstead_difficulty",
                  "sloc", "max_nesting_depth")

cat("=== FULL DATASET ===\n")
for (m in metrics_list) {
  test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(df[[m]], df$readability_score, method = "spearman"))
  cat(m, ": rho =", round(test$estimate, 3), ", p < 0.001\n")
}

cat("\n=== EXCLUDING HEAVY LIBRARY FILES ===\n")
df_noheavy <- df |> filter(heavy_library == FALSE)
for (m in metrics_list) {
  test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(df_noheavy[[m]], df_noheavy$readability_score, method = "spearman"))
  cat(m, ": rho =", round(test$estimate, 3), ", p < 0.001\n")
}
```

## Difficulty Progression (RQ3)

```{r warning=FALSE}
day_summary <- df |>
  group_by(day) |>
  summarise(
    mean_readability = mean(readability_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_cyclomatic  = mean(cyclomatic_complexity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_cognitive   = mean(cognitive_complexity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_sloc        = mean(sloc, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )

print(day_summary, n = 25)

cat("\n=== CORRELATION WITH PUZZLE DAY ===\n")
for (v in c("readability_score", "cyclomatic_complexity", "cognitive_complexity", "sloc")) {
  test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(df$day, df[[v]], method = "spearman"))
  cat(v, ": rho =", round(test$estimate, 3), ", p < 0.001\n")
}
```

## ANOVA: Difficulty Groups

```{r}
df <- df |>
  mutate(difficulty_group = case_when(
    day <= 8  ~ "Early (1-8)",
    day <= 16 ~ "Mid (9-16)",
    TRUE      ~ "Late (17-25)"
  ))

anova_result <- aov(readability_score ~ difficulty_group, data = df)
summary(anova_result)
TukeyHSD(anova_result)
```

## Paired T-tests: Part 1 vs Part 2

```{r}
df_parts <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(part)) |>
  group_by(username, year, day) |>
  filter(sum(part == 1) == 1 & sum(part == 2) == 1) |>
  ungroup()

cat("Clean pairs:", nrow(df_parts) / 2, "\n")

part1 <- df_parts |> filter(part == 1) |> arrange(username, year, day)
part2 <- df_parts |> filter(part == 2) |> arrange(username, year, day)

for (v in c("readability_score", "cyclomatic_complexity", "cognitive_complexity", "sloc")) {
  test <- t.test(part1[[v]], part2[[v]], paired = TRUE, na.action = na.omit)
  cat(v, ":\n")
  cat("  mean part 1:", round(mean(part1[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
  cat("  mean part 2:", round(mean(part2[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
  cat("  difference:", round(test$estimate, 3), "\n")
  cat("  t =", round(test$statistic, 3), ", p =", round(test$p.value, 4), "\n")
  cat("  95% CI: [", round(test$conf.int[1], 3), ",", round(test$conf.int[2], 3), "]\n\n")
}
```

## Runtime Analysis

```{r warning=FALSE}
df_runtime <- df |> filter(!is.na(runtime))
cat("Rows with runtime:", nrow(df_runtime), "\n")
summary(df_runtime$runtime)

test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(df_runtime$runtime, df_runtime$readability_score, method = "spearman"))
cat("Runtime vs readability: rho =", round(test$estimate, 3), ", p =", round(test$p.value, 4), "\n")

cat("\n=== RUNTIME VS ALL METRICS ===\n")
for (v in c("readability_score", "cyclomatic_complexity", "cognitive_complexity",
            "halstead_volume", "halstead_difficulty", "sloc", "max_nesting_depth",
            "comment_ratio", "avg_identifier_length")) {
  test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(df_runtime$runtime, df_runtime[[v]], method = "spearman"))
  cat(v, ": rho =", round(test$estimate, 3), ", p =", round(test$p.value, 4), "\n")
}
```

## OLS and LMER Models

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df_model <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(cyclomatic_complexity) & !is.na(cognitive_complexity)) |>
  mutate(across(c(cyclomatic_complexity, cognitive_complexity,
                  halstead_volume, halstead_difficulty,
                  sloc, max_nesting_depth), scale))

ols <- lm(readability_score ~ cyclomatic_complexity + cognitive_complexity +
            halstead_volume + halstead_difficulty + sloc + max_nesting_depth,
          data = df_model)

cat("=== OLS ===\n")
summary(ols)

model <- lmer(readability_score ~ cyclomatic_complexity + cognitive_complexity +
                halstead_volume + halstead_difficulty + sloc + max_nesting_depth +
                (1 | username),
              data = df_model, REML = FALSE)

cat("\n=== LMER ===\n")
summary(model)

var_components <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(model))
user_var  <- var_components[var_components$grp == "username", "vcov"]
resid_var <- var_components[var_components$grp == "Residual", "vcov"]
cat("\nICC:", round(user_var / (user_var + resid_var), 3), "\n")

r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(model)
cat("Marginal R²:", round(r2[1], 3), "\n")
cat("Conditional R²:", round(r2[2], 3), "\n")
```

## Sub-dimension Dominance

```{r}
for (s in c("naming", "modularity", "control_flow", "comments_docs", "pythonic_style")) {
  r2 <- summary(lm(as.formula(paste("readability_score ~", s)), data = df))$r.squared
  cat(s, ": R² =", round(r2, 3), "\n")
}
```

## Plots

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
base_size <- 11

p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(readability_score))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of LLM Readability Scores",
       x = "Readability Score", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size)

cor_results <- data.frame(
  metric = c("Cyclomatic", "Cognitive", "Halstead Volume",
             "Halstead Difficulty", "SLOC", "Max Nesting Depth"),
  rho    = c(-0.382, -0.417, -0.241, -0.238, 0.173, -0.218)
)

p2 <- ggplot(cor_results, aes(x = reorder(metric, rho), y = rho, fill = rho > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "coral"), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Spearman Correlation with Readability Score",
       x = "", y = "Spearman's rho") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size)

p3 <- ggplot(df |> filter(!is.na(cognitive_complexity)),
       aes(x = cognitive_complexity, y = readability_score)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", se = TRUE) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 40)) +
  labs(title = "Cognitive Complexity vs Readability Score",
       x = "Cognitive Complexity", y = "Readability Score",
       caption = "X-axis capped at 40") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size)

p4 <- ggplot(df |> filter(!is.na(halstead_volume)),
       aes(x = halstead_volume, y = readability_score)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", se = TRUE) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 2000), ylim = c(1, 9)) +
  labs(title = "Halstead Volume vs Readability Score",
       x = "Halstead Volume", y = "Readability Score",
       caption = "X-axis capped at 2000") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size)

p5 <- ggplot(df |> filter(!is.na(cognitive_complexity)),
       aes(x = factor(readability_score), y = cognitive_complexity)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 30)) +
  labs(title = "Cognitive Complexity by Readability Score",
       x = "Readability Score", y = "Cognitive Complexity",
       caption = "Y-axis capped at 30") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size)

p6 <- ggplot(day_summary, aes(x = day)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_readability, color = "Readability"), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_cognitive, color = "Cognitive Complexity"), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = mean_readability, color = "Readability"), se = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = mean_cognitive, color = "Cognitive Complexity"), se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Readability" = "steelblue", "Cognitive Complexity" = "coral")) +
  labs(title = "Readability and Cognitive Complexity Across Puzzle Days",
       x = "Puzzle Day", y = "Mean Score", color = "Metric") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size)

ggsave("p1_readability_distribution.pdf",      plot = p1, width = 5, height = 3.5)
ggsave("p2_correlation_bar.pdf",               plot = p2, width = 5, height = 3.5)
ggsave("p3_cognitive_vs_readability.pdf",      plot = p3, width = 5, height = 3.5)
ggsave("p4_halstead_vs_readability.pdf",       plot = p4, width = 5, height = 3.5)
ggsave("p5_cognitive_by_readability_box.pdf",  plot = p5, width = 5, height = 3.5)
ggsave("p6_readability_complexity_by_day.pdf", plot = p6, width = 5, height = 3.5)

cat("Plots saved to:", getwd(), "\n")
```
